channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: 'Blood moon' lights up the sky. See photos of total lunar eclipse. - USA Today
item.description:
1. 'Blood moon' lights up the sky. See photos of total lunar eclipse.  USA Today

  4. Total lunar eclipse photos from Florida, worthy of Instagram, TikTok  Florida Today
  5. Blood-moon eclipse dazzles San Diegans who were able to see the show  NBC 7 San Diego

item.description:

item.title: The world's 1st private space telescope just spotted its 1st star. Here's what it saw. - Space
item.description:
1. The world's 1st private space telescope just spotted its 1st star. Here's what it saw.  Space

  4. Mauve – ‘First light’ From the First Commercial Space Science Satellite Heralds a New Era for Astronomical Data  europlanet.org
  5. Pink: Spectrum of eta UMa acquired in a single capture by Mauve on 9 February 2026 with a 5s integration time. Blue: Hubble Space Telescope STIS spectra of the same star recorded by three grisms  EurekAlert!
